rationale: Source is detailed and prescriptive (refactor pattern known). Research must verify the target path, AbstractTool contract, FormSchema/FormRegistry shape, existing service-registration patterns, and existing tests/callers — not explore design space.

queries.intent: Confirm DatabaseFormTool location and read full module to map current logic that must move to a service.
Inspect FormSchema and supporting types to confirm the service's return contract.
Inspect AbstractTool / ToolResult to confirm DatabaseFormTool's required interface.
Inspect FormRegistry to know what register() expects and whether the service or the tool should call it.
Look for similar service/strategy registry patterns elsewhere in parrot to align this new sub-package.
Identify callers of DatabaseFormTool/DatabaseFormInput to assess backward-compatibility impact of adding a service field.
List existing tests for DatabaseFormTool so the proposal can flag updates / new service tests.
Detect existing dynamic loader patterns (e.g. importlib.import_module, register decorator) to recommend the right resolution strategy.
Get recent activity on database_form.py to surface ongoing churn or recent design intent.
Inspect tools/__init__.py to know what symbols the new package must export.
Inspect the sibling parrot/forms/tools/database_form.py to clarify whether it shares logic with parrot-formdesigner or is a stale duplicate.
